reference: Low hemoglobin levels can cause blurred vision and dizziness. However, now that your hemoglobin has increased to twelve, this should no longer be the cause. Please get a computed tomography scan done.
text: Low hemoglobin levels can cause blurred vision and dizziness. However, now that your hemoglobin has increased twelve, this can no longer be a cause. Please get a computed tomography scan done.
